name: HWR_SRVY_ELIG_PROFILE
description: This table is for eligibility profile for organization survey

columns.Name: SURVEY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Survey Id identifying the Survey entry in this table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey.

columns.Name: ELIG_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Eligibility Profile ID which the survey is sent to.

columns.Name: ELIG_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Eligibility Object ID for which profiles are attached. This is generated from eligibility objects table.

columns.Name: ELIG_ESS_JOB_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Eligibility ESS job Request ID for which the eligibility object profiles need to be evaluated.

columns.Name: IS_PRFL_RESULT_AVAILABLE
columns.Comments: This determines if the Eligibility ESS evaluation job is completed and Eligibility profiles result is available.

columns.Name: SURVEY_ELIG_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: SURVEY_ELIG_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SURVEY_ELIG_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: SURVEY_ELIG_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
